scope: goal arc saturation: live-code protocol and browser-smoke repair
rubric: product/game with Studio OS process honesty

findings.title: /go referenced a missing cache helper and startup validation warned about a missing HUMAN PRESSURE block
findings.evidence: node scripts/cache-genius-list.mjs --check failed with MODULE_NOT_FOUND; node scripts/validate-brief-format.mjs docs/STARTUP_BRIEF.md reported missing recommended HUMAN PRESSURE block.
findings.implementation: Added scripts/cache-genius-list.mjs, exposed it through ops.mjs, rendered a canonical zero-pressure HUMAN PRESSURE block, and covered the shims/brief/cache in studio protocol smoke tests.

findings.title: Advance-week browser smoke could hang when a GM Decision prompt appeared
findings.evidence: npm run test:ui failed in tests-ui/app.spec.js:44 with #statusChip stuck on Advancing week while #gmDecisionModal was visible.
findings.implementation: The Playwright smoke dismisses the expected GM Decision prompt before waiting for Ready.

rejected: External SPARKED launch evidence remains honestly deferred until on-domain email forwarding and post-push public route/domain checks are verified.
verification: npx playwright test tests-ui/app.spec.js -g "create league, advance week, and open player modal" (1/1)
